prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为20252→23017→29633→35949→33652名，整体呈后移趋势，2021至2024年累计后移约15697名，但2025年出现明显反弹，较2024年 前移2297名至33652名，显示报考热度有所回升；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021–2022年为52人，2023–2025年均为50人，2026年计划仍为50人，与202 5年持平，计划端无扩缩招信号，竞争格局基本稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 广西大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第94名稳步上升至2026年第86名，近年 排名持续提升，对考生吸引力有所增强；声誉文件未收录广西大学负面舆情，整体声誉中性；抖音学校热度总排名第25位（较热），2026年有15条相关视频，综 合热度约183万，主要涉及校园文化活动，关注度处于中等偏上水平，对报考热度有温和正向作用；第五轮学科评估中广西大学无A-及以上学科，优势学科不突 出，对高分考生吸引力有限，但作为广西唯一211仍具区域影响力。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次反弹趋势、招生计划持平、软科排名稳步上升及 抖音热度中等偏上，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年33652名基础上继续小幅前移，预测最低位次约33452名，区间32952–33952名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 20252 → 23017 → 29633 → 35949 → 33652, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 15697 places from 2021 to 2024. However, in 2025, there was a significant rebound, moving forward 2297 places compared to 2024 to 33652, indicating a recovery in application popularity. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province was 52 students from 2021 to 2022, and 50 students from 2023 to 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 50 students, unchanged from 2025, with no signals of expansion or contraction, and the competitive landscape is basically stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing its appeal to candidates. The reputation file does not include negative public opinion about Guangxi University, and the overall reputation is neutral. The university's Douyin popularity ranks 25th overall (relatively hot), with 15 related videos in 2026 and a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, mainly involving campus cultural activities, with attention at a moderately high level, having a mild positive effect on application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Guangxi University has no A- or above disciplines, and its advantageous disciplines are not prominent, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates. However, as the only 211 university in Guangxi, it still has regional influence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Liaoning Province is about 143,000, basically unchanged from 143,000 in 2025. The overall competitive environment has no significant changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend in 2025 rankings, unchanged enrollment plan, steady rise in Soft Science ranking, and moderately high Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to move forward slightly from the 2025 ranking of 33652. The predicted minimum ranking is about 33452, with a range of 32952 to 33952.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 32952 to 33952, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Mechatronic Engineering, Accounting) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Intelligent Construction, Civil Engineering) as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science.
